strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across varied tech stacks, meeting the minimum baseline requirement.
Demonstrates the preferred entrepreneurial experience as the Founder and developer of the GISCollective platform.
Has recent, hands-on exposure to AI integrations, specifically building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq.
concerns: Lacks Director-level individual contributor seniority, with technical roles peaking at Staff Software Engineer.
AI experience appears limited to recent tooling integrations rather than the deep, recognized AI platform strategy required.
No evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
response.justification: Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience, evidenced by his continuous technical roles since 2009, and meets the preferred entrepreneurial qualification as the Founder of GISCollective. However, this role requires a Director-level Principal Engineer with deep, recognized expertise in AI platform strategy and enterprise customer advisory. While his recent work at re:cinq notes building 'MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators,' his resume lacks evidence of driving high-level strategic AI initiatives, advanced machine learning design, or holding Director-level technical leadership. Consequently, despite being a highly capable Staff-level engineer, he falls short of the specialized AI strategy and seniority required for this Principal role.
